servinfo.title: Gear Shift Control Lever and Cable Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Gear Shift Control Lever and Cable Components

attention2.ptxt: Touching a hot exhaust system component will cause a burn.
Do not perform any service work on the gear shift control cable until the exhaust system is cool.

s1.ptxt: Remove battery, battery tray and battery bracket with ECM.
Disconnect end (1) of gear shift control cable from pivot (2) of gear shift control lever assembly (3) using flat-bladed screwdriver or the like.
Disconnect end (4) of gear select control cable from pivot (5) of gear shift control lever assembly.
Disconnect gear shift and gear select control cables (6) from gear shift control lever assembly while pulling up quick joint (7) in arrow direction.
Remove gear shift control lever assembly nuts (8) and remove gear shift control lever assembly from floor panel.

topic.title: Gear shift and gear select control cable

s1.ptxt: Remove battery, battery tray and battery bracket with ECM.
Disconnect end (1) of gear shift control cable from pivot (2) of gear shift control lever assembly (3) using flat-bladed screwdriver or the like.
Disconnect end (4) of gear select control cable from pivot (5) of gear shift control lever assembly.
Disconnect gear shift and gear select control cables (6) from gear shift control lever assembly while pulling up quick joint (7) in arrow direction.
Disconnect gear shift and gear select control cables from transaxle while puling up quick joint (1) in arrow direction.
Remove cable grommet bolts (2) and cable clamp nuts (3), and then remove gear shift and select control cables from floor panel.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points:

item.ptxt: Tighten each bolt and nut to specified torque.
